title: Information Retrieval Foundations and Inverted Indexes
description: A team calls substring matching retrieval, cannot define a document or relevance judgment, and returns results in hash-map order when scores tie. Learners cumulatively produce inspectable mini search engine through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Model corpus, document, field, query, information need, relevance, judgment, candidate, rank, and cutoff as distinct objects.
Implement AND, OR, NOT, phrase, and field constraints using explicit set semantics and precedence.
Build term dictionaries and postings with document identity, frequency, position, field, and deterministic serialization evidence.
